linkedinPosts.summary:
The Translation No One Owns

Who is responsible for translating a roadmap into the actual reallocation of capacity it requires?

The Manager Who Wants to Be Replaced

Most managers do not actually want their teams to replace them. The incentives explain why.

caseStudies.title: AU Civic Tech Fund (AUCTF 2.0)
caseStudies.description: Coordinated delivery across GIZ, CTIN and Ushahidi for a 15-organisation grantee cohort. One grantee won the Nelson Mandela–Graça Machel Innovation Award.

caseStudies.title: NetHope Climate Resilience
caseStudies.description: Multi-state participatory climate design across NetHope, YARN and state government — community priorities feeding directly into state-level planning.

caseStudies.title: Tana River Climate Action
caseStudies.description: SMS, WhatsApp and zero-rated reporting tools built with GIZ, NCPWD, AKCMO and county government — accessible to persons with disabilities and rural households.

caseStudies.title: NetHope Climate Action
caseStudies.description: Participatory climate data across host and refugee communities — surfaced how climate stress deepens GBV, feeding directly into district planning.
